name: USAID
description: The U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) provides programmatic access to foreign assistance data, development finance records, project tracking, aid flow analysis, and global development datasets through a suite of REST APIs.

itemListElement.name: ForeignAssistance.gov Data API
itemListElement.description: The U.S. government's flagship source for foreign assistance budgetary and financial data, exposing spending, obligations, and disbursements across all U.S. government agencies managing foreign assistance portfolios.

itemListElement.name: USAID Development Data Library API
itemListElement.description: Provides programmatic access to USAID's open datasets via the Socrata Open Data API (SODA), covering development activities, projects, evaluations, and geographic data.

itemListElement.name: USAID Development Experience Clearinghouse API
itemListElement.description: Provides programmatic access to the largest online repository of USAID-funded international development documentation, including technical reports, evaluations, assessments, and project documents.
